label: qwen36-q4-speculative-draft-followups

draftOnFourthGpu.failure: Level Zero UR_RESULT_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY before useful generation
draftOnFourthGpu.interpretation: Exposing all four GPUs for the draft model makes the target tensor-split path interact with global ggml_sycl_info().device_count; target 3x plus draft 1x likely needs active-device-aware split-buffer accounting.

cpuDraftControl.decision: Do not use Qwen3.5 4B Q4_K_M as a Qwen3.6 27B draft model for speed claims.

targetOnlyNgram.notes: llama-speculative requires a draft model; target-only ngram through llama-cli timed out before useful timings.

localMaxxing.reason: All speculative Q4 follow-ups were failed or invalid speed paths.

next: Use a Qwen3.6-specific MTP/DFlash draft rather than a generic Qwen3.5 4B draft.
Make llama.cpp/SYCL split buffers active-device-aware before target 3x plus draft 1x in one process.
Keep vLLM FP8 n-gram/MTP as the currently more promising speculative track.
Consider the fourth B70 for concurrent sessions until target/draft placement is source-correct.
